title: Don Miller
compiled_truth: Don Miller is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-12 to 2001-08-06), Don Miller sent 161 and received 561 emails, totalling 722 interactions. Top correspondents: [Benjamin Rogers](people/benjamin-rogers) (113), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (49), [Jinsung Myung](people/jinsung-myung) (25), [Jonathan Hoff](people/jonathan-hoff) (18), [Mitch Robinson](people/mitch-robinson) (16). Mailbox folders observed: _americas.
